title: h3rb3rn/moe-sovereign
summary: Self-hosted Compound AI System for sovereign environments. Features token-saving complexity routing, deterministic MCP tools for math/logic, configurable expert templates, causal/reinforcement learning, agentic loops, and a federated Neo4j GraphRAG.

title: muycoreano/mem-fusion
summary: Memory fusion for Claude Code — across sessions, cognitive layers, and machines. Personal memory today; group memory via the bundled Constellation extension in v0.3.0.

title: adrianwedd/spark
summary: SPARK — a Claude-powered robot companion for a neurodivergent kid. Built on SunFounder PiCar-X + Raspberry Pi.

title: neochaotic/powerlab
summary: The headless OS panel for home servers and edge boxes — self-hosted, AI-friendly, beautiful.

title: KofTwentyTwo/Jarvis
summary: Personal always-on macOS AI assistant in the shape of the Iron Man HUD — native Swift brain, R3F particle-ring face, voice-first, locally-grounded.

title: okrinoggen33/voxn
summary: A local-first memory layer for users and AI agents to capture, search, and synthesize project context.

title: skymoonsun/model-maestro
summary: Unified LLM Gateway that proxies multiple providers (Ollama, OpenAI-compatible) behind a single API. Enables IDEs and tools to access    multiple models via standard API formats. Manage LLM usage with per-user token limits, request logging, load balancing, model groups, and an admin dashboard.

title: codecentric/c4-genai-suite
summary: c4 GenAI Suite

title: ABroye/ConsultIA
summary: ConsultIA : Assistant intelligent local d'audit et de relation client. Automatise l'extraction de besoins IT/RH depuis Gmail et la rédaction de réponses professionnelles via CrewAI et Llama3 (Ollama). 100% local, 0% transfert de données cloud.

title: Oolab-labs/patchwork-os
summary: personal AI runtime, local-first. MCP bridge giving Claude Code 170+ tools (LSP, debugger, terminal, git) inside VS Code, Cursor, Windsurf, or JetBrains. Optional Patchwork layer adds YAML recipes, an approval queue, and an oversight dashboard. Your models, your machine, your policy.

title: maruakshay/miii-cli
summary: Open-source local Claude Code alternative. AI coding agent for terminal with Ollama, OpenAI & Groq support.

title: ollama/ollama
summary: Get up and running with Kimi-K2.5, GLM-5, MiniMax, DeepSeek, gpt-oss, Qwen, Gemma and other models.

title: Vasallo94/ObsidianRAG
summary: Ask questions about your Obsidian notes using local AI. Privacy-first RAG with Ollama, LM Studio, or any OpenAI-compatible server. Obsidian plugin + Docker + PyPI.

title: ravikiran134/api-doc-generator
summary: AI-powered API documentation generator for Spring Boot applications using local LLMs via Ollama

title: repairman29/chump
summary: Self-hosted AI coding agent with persistent memory and bounded autonomy. Local-first, your keys, your data. Written in Rust.

title: undergroundpost/obsidian-auto-name
summary: Intelligently rename untitled notes in Obsidian using AI

title: Ahkeratmehilaiset/waggledance-swarm
summary: Local-first AI runtime that routes 10k+ solver descriptors at warm p99 0.05 ms (1000/1000 hits, zero fallback) and spawns 1004 live agent clones in 120 s. Hex-mesh routing, MAGMA-audited provenance, agent-bridge autonomy fabric. Profile S (fully offline) or Profile L (opt-in cloud). BUSL.

title: aommi/applycling
summary: Drop a job URL, get a complete application package — tailored resume, cover letter, positioning brief, and outreach drafts. Never fabricates. Supports Claude, GPT-4o, Gemini, and Ollama. Tracks everything in Notion or SQLite.

title: Glad-Labs/poindexter
summary: Poindexter — open-source AI content pipeline that researches, writes, reviews, and publishes autonomously. Self-hosted on your machine. Built by Glad Labs LLC.

title: TheZupZup/Nova
summary: A privacy-first, self-hosted AI assistant with smart model routing and local LLM support (Ollama).
